---
title: "charm_data_process_functions.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../charm.html)

Data processing utilities for CHARM inputs and outputs.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/charm/src/python/charm_data_process_functions.py >}}
```

:::
